evals.name: clean_ieee_ready
evals.prompt: Finalize the polished manuscript at /Users/kyc/PythonProject/EyeGaze-Multimodal/journal-finalize-workspace/fixtures/clean_ieee_ready/. The polished sections live in step5_polished/, the previous revised draft in step4_draft_v1/, upstream artifacts in step1_preprocessed/, and the session config in step0_session_config.json. Run all phases of finalization and write the complete step6_final/ output bundle (hard_constraints.json, semantic_drift.json, latex/ package, bilingual/ scaffold, final_check_report.md) to the OUTPUT DIRECTORY GIVEN BELOW. The manuscript targets IEEE TNSRE.
evals.expected_output: Verdict READY. All 6 hard checks pass with 0 critical/major flags. Zero fallbacks (semantic_drift puts every section as use=polished). LaTeX package uses IEEEtran preamble + IEEEtran bibstyle, all 7 section files emitted, structural sanity passed, references.bib pruned to the 5 cited keys. Bilingual scaffold emits 7 .md files with EN callouts filled and 繁中 callouts populated by the LLM (not left as the placeholder comment). final_check_report.md follows the template with verdict READY.

evals.name: elsevier_drift_review
evals.prompt: Finalize the polished manuscript at /Users/kyc/PythonProject/EyeGaze-Multimodal/journal-finalize-workspace/fixtures/elsevier_drift_review/. Inputs follow the standard layout (step5_polished/, step4_draft_v1/, step1_preprocessed/, step0_session_config.json). The target journal is Advanced Engineering Informatics (Elsevier). Run all phases and write the complete step6_final/ bundle to the OUTPUT DIRECTORY GIVEN BELOW.
evals.expected_output: Verdict REVIEW NEEDED. Hard checks all pass (no critical flags). semantic_drift.json flags 05_discussion as drift=true (citation added + boost-word swing); the LaTeX 05_discussion.tex falls back to the step4 text and carries the % [FINALIZE] comment header pointing to the report. Other six sections use polished. elsarticle preamble selected. Bilingual scaffold built and 繁中 filled.

evals.name: blocked_phantom_and_abstract
evals.prompt: Finalize the polished manuscript at /Users/kyc/PythonProject/EyeGaze-Multimodal/journal-finalize-workspace/fixtures/blocked_phantom_and_abstract/. Inputs follow the standard layout. Target journal: IEEE TNSRE. Run all phases and write the complete step6_final/ bundle to the OUTPUT DIRECTORY GIVEN BELOW. Do NOT silently fix problems in the polished text — surface them in the report so the human can decide.
evals.expected_output: Verdict BLOCKED. hard_constraints.json contains at least 2 critical flags: PHANTOM_CITATION for \cite{NotInBib} in 01_introduction, and one or both of ABSTRACT_NUMBER_NOT_IN_RESULTS / NUMBER_NOT_IN_SOURCE for the 0.921 abstract figure. semantic_drift.json flags 01_introduction (citation delta). LaTeX package is still written (so the author can inspect), with the introduction falling back to step4. final_check_report.md verdict is BLOCKED, lists the critical flags in §1, and the Next Steps section gets a #4 specific to addressing the failures.
